zh.lifeSummary: 當John Andrews II於1410年10月4日出生在英國素福爾可貝利哈姆時，他的父親James Andrews25歲，母親Alice de Weyland21歲。他於1439年與Elizabeth de Stratton在英國英格蘭諾福爾可結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和4個女兒的父母。他去世於1475年在英國英格蘭素福爾可斯托克 白 易普斯維其享年65歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当John Andrews II于1410年10月4日出生在英国素福爾可貝利哈姆时，他的父亲James Andrews25岁，母亲Alice de Weyland21岁。他于1439年与Elizabeth de Stratton在英国英格兰諾福爾可结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和4个女儿的父母。他去世于1475年在英国英格兰素福爾可斯托克 白 易普斯維其享年65岁，埋葬在英国英格兰。

nameMeanings.name: Andrews
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: variant of Andrew , with genitival or post-medieval excrescent -s. This is the usual southern English patronymic form, also found in Wales; the Scottish and northern English form is Anderson . In North America, this surname has absorbed various cognates from other languages, e.g. Polish Andrzejewski , Slovenian Andrejčič, Serbian and Croatian Andrić (see Andric ), and Czech Ondráček (see Ondracek ).
Irish and Scottish: Anglicized form of Scottish Gaelic Mac Aindreis or Irish Mac Aindriú, see McAndrew .

History: This was a common name among the early settlers in New England. Robert Andrews emigrated in 1635 from Norwich, England, to Ipswich, MA. Even before 1635, one Thomas Andrews is recorded as being established in Hingham. A certain William Andrews was a member of John Davenport's company, which sailed from Boston in 1638 to found the New Haven colony.

variants.name: Andrus
meanings: History: William Andrus came to Boston in 1635 and moved to New Haven in 1639, where he died in 1676.

variants.name: Andrew
meanings: English and Scottish: from the usual vernacular English form (recorded from the 13th century onward) of the New Testament Greek personal name Andreas . In North America, the English form of the surname has absorbed many cognates from other languages, e.g. Czech Ondřej (see Ondrey ) and Albanian Ndreu , and also their patronymics and other derivatives (see examples at Andrews ).
History: The surname Andrew was first brought to North America from England by Robert Andrew (died 1668), who settled in Boxford, MA.

variants.name: Andros
meanings: English: variant of   Andrews  . This surname is very rare in Britain.

American shortened form of Greek Andronikos (see Andron 2) or of any other surname based on a personal name beginning with Andr- (from andros, genitive of anēr ‘man, male’), e.g. Androutsos, including their patronymics and other derivatives, such as Andronikidis.

History: William Andros came to VA in 1617 and died there c. 1655. Sir Edmund Andros (1637–1714) was the British colonial governor of several provinces in America between 1674 and 1698, most notably NY (1674–81).

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: As a boy's name this represents a revival of Middle English Jan, a by‐form of John , or an adoption of the common European form with this spelling. As a girl's name it is a short form of names such as Janet and Janice .

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When John Andrews II was born on 4 October 1410, in Baylham, Suffolk, England, his father, James Andrews, was 25 and his mother, Alice de Weyland, was 21. He married Elizabeth de Stratton in 1439, in Norfolk, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 4 daughters. He died in 1475, in Stoke by Ipswich, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 65, and was buried in England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque John Andrews II est né le 4 octobre 1410, à Baylham, Suffolk, Angleterre, son père, James Andrews, avait 25 ans et sa mère, Alice de Weyland, avait 21 ans. Il a épousé Elizabeth de Stratton en 1439, à Norfolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 4 filles. Il est décédé en 1475, à Stoke by Ipswich, Suffolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 65 ans, et a été enterré à Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

ja.lifeSummary: John Andrews IIが1410年10月4日にイギリススフォルクバイルハムで生まれた時，父James Andrewsは25歳，母Alice de Weylandは21歳であった。1439年にイギリスイギリスノーフォルクでElizabeth de Strattonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼は1475年にイギリスイギリススフォルクストク ビー イプスウィチで65歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスにて埋葬された。

ko.Bury St Edmunds, Suffolk, England: 영국 잉글랜드 수폴크 버이 스트 에드먼드즈
ko.lifeSummary: John Andrews II(이)가 1410년 10월 4일 영국 수폴크 베이함에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 James Andrews(은)는 25세였고, 그의 어머니 Alice de Weyland(은)는 21세였다. 그는 1439년 영국 잉글랜드 노르폴크에서 Elizabeth de Stratton(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1475년 영국 잉글랜드 수폴크 스토크 비 이프스위치에서 65세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando John Andrews II nasceu em 4 de outubro de 1410, em Baylham, Suffolk, Inglaterra, seu pai, James Andrews, tinha 25 anos e sua mãe, Alice de Weyland, tinha 21 anos. Ele casou-se com Elizabeth de Stratton em 1439, em Norfolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 4 filhas. Ele faleceu em 1475, em Stoke by Ipswich, Suffolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 65 anos, e foi sepultado em Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда John Andrews II родился 4 октября 1410 г. в местности беилхам, суффолк, Англия, его отцу по имени James Andrews было 25 лет, а матери, которую звали Alice de Weyland, 21. Он женился на женщине по имени Elizabeth de Stratton в 1439 г. в местности норфолк, Англия, Великобритания. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 4 дочери. Он умер в 1475 г. в местности сток би ипсвич, суффолк, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 65 лет и был похоронен в местности Англия, Великобритания.
